song.title: Hallelujah What A Savior
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) “Man of Sorrows,” what a name For the Son of God who came Ruined sinners to reclaim! Hallelujah! What a Savior!
[V2] 2) Bearing shame and scoffing rude, In my place condemned He stood; Sealed my pardon with His blood; Hallelujah! What a Savior!
[V3] 3) Guilty, vile, and helpless, we, Spotless Lamb of God was He; Full redemption— can it be? Hallelujah! What a Savior!
[V4] 4) Lifted up was He to die, “It is finished!” was His cry; Now in heaven exalted high; Hallelujah! What a Savior!
[V5] 5) When He comes, our glorious King, To His kingdom us to bring, Then anew this song we’ll sing: Hallelujah! What a Savior!
song.author: Philip P. Bliss
